requestBody.resume_text:
JOHN DOE
Software Engineer
Email: john.doe@email.com | Phone: (555) 123-4567
LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/johndoe | GitHub: github.com/johndoe

SUMMARY
Experienced Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience developing scalable web applications and distributed systems. Proficient in Python, JavaScript, and cloud technologies. Strong background in REST APIs, Docker, and CI/CD pipelines.

EXPERIENCE

Senior Software Engineer | TechCorp Inc. | San Francisco, CA | 2021 - Present
• Developed and maintained microservices architecture serving 1M+ daily users
• Implemented CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and Docker, reducing deployment time by 60%
• Led a team of 3 junior developers and mentored new hires
• Technologies: Python, Flask, PostgreSQL, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes

Software Engineer | StartupXYZ | Austin, TX | 2019 - 2021
• Built REST APIs for mobile and web applications using Python and Django
• Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver features on tight deadlines
• Optimized database queries improving application performance by 40%
• Technologies: Python, Django, MySQL, Redis, Git

Junior Developer | DevShop LLC | Austin, TX | 2018 - 2019
• Developed frontend components using React and JavaScript
• Participated in code reviews and followed agile development practices
• Fixed bugs and implemented small features under senior guidance
• Technologies: JavaScript, React, Node.js, MongoDB

EDUCATION
Bachelor of Science in Computer Science | University of Texas at Austin | 2018
GPA: 3.8/4.0
Relevant Coursework: Data Structures, Algorithms, Database Systems, Software Engineering

SKILLS
Programming Languages: Python, JavaScript, Java, Go
Frameworks: Django, Flask, React, Node.js
Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis
Cloud & DevOps: AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, Git
Other: REST APIs, Microservices, Agile Development, Testing

CERTIFICATIONS
• AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Associate (2022)
• Docker Certified Associate (2021)

PROJECTS
E-commerce Platform | Personal Project | 2020
• Built a full-stack e-commerce application using Python/Django and React
• Implemented payment processing with Stripe API
• Deployed on AWS using Docker containers
• GitHub: github.com/johndoe/ecommerce-platform
requestBody.job_details:
About the job
Position: Java Solution Architect - FinTech 
Salary: $224k (Base & super.) 
Industry: Superannuation
Location: Sydney CBD
Hybrid working - 3 days per week on-site
24 month Fixed term position

Do you have experience as a Solution Architect with a background in Java?

Our client are a global FinTech with a market leading superannuation administration platform.

We're looking for experience in AWS experience, and a background in Java and API's....who's ideally been the SA on SaaS platforms in the Wealth Management or Superannuation industry.

Experience:
5+ years in an architecture role
Solid understanding of AWS cloud infrastructure
A background in Java development / architecture
Implement and designing SaaS products

Nice to haves:
Docker and Java experience, including working with Spring Security or Oauth
Experience in a wealth administration technology company (highly advantageous).

If you tick the boxes above and you're ready for your next permanent position, please do send me your cv on here or email me at matt@hawksworth.com.au

The interview process is 2 stage. It's a hybrid working model, so 3 days in their Sydney CBD office.

Thank you for reading our advert and hopefully your experience matches this role and we can set-up a time to catchup over a call.

#solutionarchitect #superannuation #trading #sydneyCBD #AWS #hybrid

Therefore, her experience does not align with the core requirements of this particular role.

Position: Java Solution Architect - FinTech 
Salary: $224k (Base & super.) 
Industry: Superannuation
Location: Sydney CBD
Hybrid working - 3 days per week on-site
24 month Fixed term position

Do you have experience as a Solution Architect with a background in Java?

Our client are a global FinTech with a market leading superannuation administration platform.

We're looking for experience in AWS experience, and a background in Java and API's....who's ideally been the SA on SaaS platforms in the Wealth Management or Superannuation industry.

Experience:
5+ years in an architecture role
Solid understanding of AWS cloud infrastructure
A background in Java development / architecture
Implement and designing SaaS products

Nice to haves:
Docker and Java experience, including working with Spring Security or Oauth
Experience in a wealth administration technology company (highly advantageous).

If you tick the boxes above and you're ready for your next permanent position, please do send me your cv on here or email me at matt@hawksworth.com.au

The interview process is 2 stage. It's a hybrid working model, so 3 days in their Sydney CBD office.

Thank you for reading our advert and hopefully your experience matches this role and we can set-up a time to catchup over a call.

#solutionarchitect #superannuation #trading #sydneyCBD #AWS #hybrid

requestBody.resume_text:
JOHN DOE
Software Engineer
Email: john.doe@email.com | Phone: (555) 123-4567
LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/johndoe | GitHub: github.com/johndoe

SUMMARY
Experienced Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience developing scalable web applications and distributed systems. Proficient in Python, JavaScript, and cloud technologies. Strong background in REST APIs, Docker, and CI/CD pipelines.

EXPERIENCE

Senior Software Engineer | TechCorp Inc. | San Francisco, CA | 2021 - Present
• Developed and maintained microservices architecture serving 1M+ daily users
• Implemented CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and Docker, reducing deployment time by 60%
• Led a team of 3 junior developers and mentored new hires
• Technologies: Python, Flask, PostgreSQL, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes

Software Engineer | StartupXYZ | Austin, TX | 2019 - 2021
• Built REST APIs for mobile and web applications using Python and Django
• Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver features on tight deadlines
• Optimized database queries improving application performance by 40%
• Technologies: Python, Django, MySQL, Redis, Git

Junior Developer | DevShop LLC | Austin, TX | 2018 - 2019
• Developed frontend components using React and JavaScript
• Participated in code reviews and followed agile development practices
• Fixed bugs and implemented small features under senior guidance
• Technologies: JavaScript, React, Node.js, MongoDB

EDUCATION
Bachelor of Science in Computer Science | University of Texas at Austin | 2018
GPA: 3.8/4.0
Relevant Coursework: Data Structures, Algorithms, Database Systems, Software Engineering

SKILLS
Programming Languages: Python, JavaScript, Java, Go
Frameworks: Django, Flask, React, Node.js
Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis
Cloud & DevOps: AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, Git
Other: REST APIs, Microservices, Agile Development, Testing

CERTIFICATIONS
• AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Associate (2022)
• Docker Certified Associate (2021)

PROJECTS
E-commerce Platform | Personal Project | 2020
• Built a full-stack e-commerce application using Python/Django and React
• Implemented payment processing with Stripe API
• Deployed on AWS using Docker containers
• GitHub: github.com/johndoe/ecommerce-platform

requestBody.job_details:
About the job
Automation QA Engineer – Quantitative is responsible for validating the accuracy, reliability, and performance of quantitative models and systems used in banking and financial applications, including pricing, risk, and interest calculations.

Key Responsibilities
Test and validate quantitative and algorithmic models for accuracy and stability
Perform automation testing for financial applications using Selenium
Validate banking calculations such as home loans, personal loans, hedging, and interest computations
Analyze and validate large datasets using SQL
Identify defects in complex models, calculations, and data flows
Prepare concise technical documentation and validation reports

Required Skills & Qualifications
Strong SQL skills for data analysis and validation
Good understanding of financial concepts including derivatives, risk metrics (VaR, CVaR), and portfolio basics
Strong experience in the banking domain, including home loans, personal loans, or hedging and interest calculation
Automation testing experience using Selenium
High attention to detail with strong analytical and problem-solving skills

requestBody.details:
About the job
Automation QA Engineer – Quantitative is responsible for validating the accuracy, reliability, and performance of quantitative models and systems used in banking and financial applications, including pricing, risk, and interest calculations.

Key Responsibilities
Test and validate quantitative and algorithmic models for accuracy and stability
Perform automation testing for financial applications using Selenium
Validate banking calculations such as home loans, personal loans, hedging, and interest computations
Analyze and validate large datasets using SQL
Identify defects in complex models, calculations, and data flows
Prepare concise technical documentation and validation reports

Required Skills & Qualifications
Strong SQL skills for data analysis and validation
Good understanding of financial concepts including derivatives, risk metrics (VaR, CVaR), and portfolio basics
Strong experience in the banking domain, including home loans, personal loans, or hedging and interest calculation
Automation testing experience using Selenium
High attention to detail with strong analytical and problem-solving skills

About the job
Company Description
Sentia is a software development consultancy company specializing in web and mobile development. Our team of enthusiastic software developers aims to create cutting-edge software solutions to help our clients succeed.

Role Description
This is a full-time on-site role for a Ruby on Rails Developer located in Sydney, NSW. The Ruby on Rails Developer will be responsible for back-end web development, front-end development and practicing Test Driven Development.

Qualifications
Back-End Web Development and Test Driven Development skills
Front-End Development expertise
Proficiency in Object-Oriented Programming (OOP)
Experience with the Model-View-Controller (MVC) design pattern
Strong problem-solving and analytical skills
Ability to work collaboratively in a team environment
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field

requestBody.resume_text:
JOHN DOE
Software Engineer
Email: john.doe@email.com | Phone: (555) 123-4567
LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/johndoe | GitHub: github.com/johndoe

SUMMARY
Experienced Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience developing scalable web applications and distributed systems. Proficient in Python, JavaScript, and cloud technologies. Strong background in REST APIs, Docker, and CI/CD pipelines.

EXPERIENCE

Senior Software Engineer | TechCorp Inc. | San Francisco, CA | 2021 - Present
• Developed and maintained microservices architecture serving 1M+ daily users
• Implemented CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and Docker, reducing deployment time by 60%
• Led a team of 3 junior developers and mentored new hires
• Technologies: Python, Flask, PostgreSQL, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes

Software Engineer | StartupXYZ | Austin, TX | 2019 - 2021
• Built REST APIs for mobile and web applications using Python and Django
• Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver features on tight deadlines
• Optimized database queries improving application performance by 40%
• Technologies: Python, Django, MySQL, Redis, Git

Junior Developer | DevShop LLC | Austin, TX | 2018 - 2019
• Developed frontend components using React and JavaScript
• Participated in code reviews and followed agile development practices
• Fixed bugs and implemented small features under senior guidance
• Technologies: JavaScript, React, Node.js, MongoDB

EDUCATION
Bachelor of Science in Computer Science | University of Texas at Austin | 2018
GPA: 3.8/4.0
Relevant Coursework: Data Structures, Algorithms, Database Systems, Software Engineering

SKILLS
Programming Languages: Python, JavaScript, Java, Go
Frameworks: Django, Flask, React, Node.js
Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis
Cloud & DevOps: AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, Git
Other: REST APIs, Microservices, Agile Development, Testing

CERTIFICATIONS
• AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Associate (2022)
• Docker Certified Associate (2021)

PROJECTS
E-commerce Platform | Personal Project | 2020
• Built a full-stack e-commerce application using Python/Django and React
• Implemented payment processing with Stripe API
• Deployed on AWS using Docker containers
• GitHub: github.com/johndoe/ecommerce-platform
requestBody.job_details:
About the job
Role Summary

Join Paradino as a full-stack software engineer focused on developing an AI-first web and mobile platform, embedding Gen AI tools in an intuitive user interface. Your work will enable advisers to dramatically cut administrative burdens and deliver better outcomes for their clients.
You’ll be working in a fast-paced startup environment where adaptability, ownership, and creative problem-solving are essential. You’ll collaborate directly with the founding team to shape both the technical architecture and the product direction.

About the Company

Paradino is on a mission to transform financial advice with AI and automation. Our platform streamlines the advice process ensuring accuracy and compliance in the Australian market.

Required Skills / Experience 

3+ years experience as a software engineer.
Javascript expertise with solid framework experience (React, Node.js, Next.js, Typescript).
Some exposure to applied Generative AI including prompt engineering.
Solid understanding of cloud infrastructure, containers and CI/CD.
Experience integrating with APIs, third-party systems, and streaming services.

Nice-to-Have

Prior experience in fintech, or similarly regulated domains
React Native / Expo experience 
Prior experience working in early-stage startups, including comfort with ambiguity, rapid iteration, and wearing multiple hats.

Benefits

Salary + Equity: Participate in Paradino’s growth journey through our employee stock option plan.
Flexible working arrangements, 4-1 hybrid model at The Commons, Martin Place. 
Weekly breakfast, community lunches and other social events.
Opportunity to work directly with the founding team and have significant influence over technical and product decisions.
A collaborative, mission-driven culture that values ownership, transparency, and impact.

Why Join Paradino?

Make a direct impact in the Australian advice industry—help advisers spend less time on admin and more on clients.
Be part of a small, mission-driven team co-founded by former advisers and tech leaders, blending deep domain knowledge with AI innovation.
Shape cutting-edge AI-powered workflows in a high-impact, high-growth startup journey.

requestBody.job_details:
About the job
Role Summary

Join Paradino as a full-stack software engineer focused on developing an AI-first web and mobile platform, embedding Gen AI tools in an intuitive user interface. Your work will enable advisers to dramatically cut administrative burdens and deliver better outcomes for their clients.
You’ll be working in a fast-paced startup environment where adaptability, ownership, and creative problem-solving are essential. You’ll collaborate directly with the founding team to shape both the technical architecture and the product direction.

About the Company

Paradino is on a mission to transform financial advice with AI and automation. Our platform streamlines the advice process ensuring accuracy and compliance in the Australian market.

Required Skills / Experience 

3+ years experience as a software engineer.
Javascript expertise with solid framework experience (React, Node.js, Next.js, Typescript).
Some exposure to applied Generative AI including prompt engineering.
Solid understanding of cloud infrastructure, containers and CI/CD.
Experience integrating with APIs, third-party systems, and streaming services.

Nice-to-Have

Prior experience in fintech, or similarly regulated domains
React Native / Expo experience 
Prior experience working in early-stage startups, including comfort with ambiguity, rapid iteration, and wearing multiple hats.

Benefits

Salary + Equity: Participate in Paradino’s growth journey through our employee stock option plan.
Flexible working arrangements, 4-1 hybrid model at The Commons, Martin Place. 
Weekly breakfast, community lunches and other social events.
Opportunity to work directly with the founding team and have significant influence over technical and product decisions.
A collaborative, mission-driven culture that values ownership, transparency, and impact.

Why Join Paradino?

Make a direct impact in the Australian advice industry—help advisers spend less time on admin and more on clients.
Be part of a small, mission-driven team co-founded by former advisers and tech leaders, blending deep domain knowledge with AI innovation.
Shape cutting-edge AI-powered workflows in a high-impact, high-growth startup journey.

- Return ONLY the array, no explanations or text
- Use 0-based indexing (first option = 0, second = 1, etc.)
- Array length must match number of questions
- Select questions = single number, checkbox questions = array of numbers, text questions = string
- Consider my actual experience and background from resume
- Choose answers that are truthful and aligned with the job

Questions: [Questions List]

requestBody.job_details:
About the job
Company Description
Techno Union AI is a leading AI consulting firm that empowers organizations to unlock the potential of Artificial Intelligence. With expertise in platforms such as Microsoft Azure, Amazon AWS, and Google Cloud, we deliver tailored strategies that drive innovation and operational excellence. Our certified, multidisciplinary team ensures robust and scalable AI solutions tailored to achieve clients’ business goals. At Techno Union AI, our values of innovation, integrity, excellence, collaboration, and customer-centricity guide us to remain Australia's premier AI solutions provider.

Role Description
This is a six months contract (highly likely to extend), three days on-site role for a Solution Designer – Integration & Microservices, based in Sydney, NSW. The role involves :
Designing and validating microservices architectures
Building integration patterns across enterprise platforms
Creating clear interface contracts and field-level mappings
Working with modern tech stacks and cloud-native deployments

Qualifications
Expertise in Solution Architecture and Integration to design robust and scalable systems
Strong grasp of RESTful design, OpenAPI/Swagger, API security (OAuth2, JWT, mTLS)
Hands-on experience with Spring Boot or similar frameworks
JSON transformation skills (JOLT or similar)
Experience with workflow engines (Camunda preferred)
Understanding of Kubernetes/Docker deployments
Event streaming platform experience (Kafka is a plus)
Solid SQL and caching knowledge (PostgreSQL, Redis)
Familiarity with cloud platforms such as AWS or Google Cloud is advantageous
Professional certifications in relevant technologies or methodologies are a plus

Nice to have:
TM Forum APIs or similar integration standards
CRM/OSS/BSS platform experience
CI/CD and Agile workflows

Our approach: We're honest about what we need on day one, but we actively support skill growth. If you're passionate about integration patterns and want to work on meaningful enterprise challenges, let's talk.

Interested? Send your CV to connect@technounion.com.au
requestBody.job_title: Solutions Designer - Cloud Integration & Spring Boot

About the job

This is a six months contract (highly likely to extend), three days on-site role for a Solution Designer – Integration & Microservices, based in Sydney, NSW. The role involves :
Designing and validating microservices architectures
Building integration patterns across enterprise platforms
Creating clear interface contracts and field-level mappings
Working with modern tech stacks and cloud-native deployments

Expertise in Solution Architecture and Integration to design robust and scalable systems

requestBody.job_details:
About the job
Company Description
Techno Union AI is a leading AI consulting firm that empowers organizations to unlock the potential of Artificial Intelligence. With expertise in platforms such as Microsoft Azure, Amazon AWS, and Google Cloud, we deliver tailored strategies that drive innovation and operational excellence. Our certified, multidisciplinary team ensures robust and scalable AI solutions tailored to achieve clients’ business goals. At Techno Union AI, our values of innovation, integrity, excellence, collaboration, and customer-centricity guide us to remain Australia's premier AI solutions provider.

Role Description
This is a six months contract (highly likely to extend), three days on-site role for a Solution Designer – Integration & Microservices, based in Sydney, NSW. The role involves :
Designing and validating microservices architectures
Building integration patterns across enterprise platforms
Creating clear interface contracts and field-level mappings
Working with modern tech stacks and cloud-native deployments

Qualifications
Expertise in Solution Architecture and Integration to design robust and scalable systems
Strong grasp of RESTful design, OpenAPI/Swagger, API security (OAuth2, JWT, mTLS)
Hands-on experience with Spring Boot or similar frameworks
JSON transformation skills (JOLT or similar)
Experience with workflow engines (Camunda preferred)
Understanding of Kubernetes/Docker deployments
Event streaming platform experience (Kafka is a plus)
Solid SQL and caching knowledge (PostgreSQL, Redis)
Familiarity with cloud platforms such as AWS or Google Cloud is advantageous
Professional certifications in relevant technologies or methodologies are a plus

Nice to have:
TM Forum APIs or similar integration standards
CRM/OSS/BSS platform experience
CI/CD and Agile workflows

Our approach: We're honest about what we need on day one, but we actively support skill growth. If you're passionate about integration patterns and want to work on meaningful enterprise challenges, let's talk.

Interested? Send your CV to connect@technounion.com.au

requestBody.job_details:
About the job
About Manifest
Manifest is an AI-powered time and tool analytics platform for agencies. We help agencies automate time tracking, gain visibility into tool usage, and improve profitability without the manual burden of timesheets. We are a fast-moving, design-led team, currently preparing for high-profile pilots with top-tier agencies.

The Role
We are looking for a Senior Software Engineer to join our founding engineering team. Reporting to the CTO, you will lead the delivery of critical product features, help architect our scalable backend, and build out integrations into connected platforms. This is a high-impact role where your work will directly shape the product and engineering culture.

What You'll Do
Lead Web Platform Development: Drive the end-to-end development of our SaaS web application using Next.js and Node.js server architecture.
Own the Web Stack: Work across the entire web stack, from Next.js frontend components to Node.js server endpoints, ensuring seamless integration and performance.
Architect for Scale: Build scalable, performant web architecture that can handle growing agency customer base and high-volume time tracking data.

What We're Looking For
Next.js Expertise: Strong experience building production web applications with Next.js or Remix (App Router, server components, API routes).
React Router: Experience with React Router for client-side navigation.
Node.js Backend: Proven ability to build and maintain scalable Node.js server applications and backend services.
Supabase: Experience with Supabase for authentication, real-time subscriptions, and database queries in React/Next.js applications.
Full-Stack Web Development: Deep experience with modern web technologies including TypeScript, React, PostgreSQL, and cloud infrastructure.
SaaS Experience: Experience building and scaling multi-tenant SaaS platforms with authentication, data isolation, and performance optimisation.

requestBody.job_details:
About the job
About Manifest
Manifest is an AI-powered time and tool analytics platform for agencies. We help agencies automate time tracking, gain visibility into tool usage, and improve profitability without the manual burden of timesheets. We are a fast-moving, design-led team, currently preparing for high-profile pilots with top-tier agencies.

The Role
We are looking for a Senior Software Engineer to join our founding engineering team. Reporting to the CTO, you will lead the delivery of critical product features, help architect our scalable backend, and build out integrations into connected platforms. This is a high-impact role where your work will directly shape the product and engineering culture.

What You'll Do
Lead Web Platform Development: Drive the end-to-end development of our SaaS web application using Next.js and Node.js server architecture.
Own the Web Stack: Work across the entire web stack, from Next.js frontend components to Node.js server endpoints, ensuring seamless integration and performance.
Architect for Scale: Build scalable, performant web architecture that can handle growing agency customer base and high-volume time tracking data.

What We're Looking For
Next.js Expertise: Strong experience building production web applications with Next.js or Remix (App Router, server components, API routes).
React Router: Experience with React Router for client-side navigation.
Node.js Backend: Proven ability to build and maintain scalable Node.js server applications and backend services.
Supabase: Experience with Supabase for authentication, real-time subscriptions, and database queries in React/Next.js applications.
Full-Stack Web Development: Deep experience with modern web technologies including TypeScript, React, PostgreSQL, and cloud infrastructure.
SaaS Experience: Experience building and scaling multi-tenant SaaS platforms with authentication, data isolation, and performance optimisation.

requestBody.job_details:
About the job
Drive growth for Aussie businesses by making them unmissable online.

About Search It Local
Search It Local is one of Australia’s fastest-growing digital agencies, helping small to medium-sized businesses thrive through powerful SEO, PPC, web and social strategies. We’re passionate about delivering real results and making digital marketing accessible, effective and jargon-free.
Based in Sydney, we offer a high-performance team culture and a workplace where your ideas and contributions genuinely matter.

About the Role
We’re looking for a sharp, data-driven SEO Analyst or Specialist to join our SEO team. This is a hands-on role focused on strategy, execution and performance. You’ll be responsible for delivering end-to-end SEO work - from technical audits and keyword research to content briefs and reporting.
You’ll collaborate with developers, writers and account managers to ensure every campaign is performing at its best and clients are seeing measurable growth.

What You'll Be Doing
Conduct keyword research and competitor analysis to guide strategy
Perform on-site and technical SEO audits using tools like SEMrush, Ahrefs and SE Ranking
Create clear, actionable content briefs for our writing team
Monitor rankings, traffic and performance across client websites
Analyse SEO metrics and prepare reports that demonstrate ROI
Identify issues, opportunities and quick wins in client accounts
Collaborate with account managers and contribute to client strategy conversations
Stay across Google algorithm updates and industry best practice

What We're Looking For
1-3 years’ experience in an SEO role (agency or in-house)
Strong knowledge of technical SEO, keyword strategy and on-page optimisation
Familiar with tools like Google Analytics, Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs and Screaming Frog, Surf SEO
Comfortable analysing data and turning it into clear, actionable insights
Excellent communication and documentation skills
Proactive problem-solver with great attention to detail
Bonus: Experience with WordPress, Shopify or Webflow

Why You'll Love Working Here
Competitive salary and clear career progression
CBD Sydney office
Supportive, down-to-earth team that celebrates wins
Ongoing training and development opportunities
Regular team lunches, events and good banter
Work on real projects that make a genuine difference to small businesses

How to Apply
If you love SEO, love problem-solving and want to help businesses grow, we want to hear from you. Send through your CV and tell us a bit about what makes you tick.

requestBody.job_details:
About the job
Role Overview
We are seeking a Senior Engineering Lead in a consulting capacity to take ownership of the engineering and technical direction of a fast-growing SaaS telephony and CX product.
This is a hands-on consulting role, combining engineering leadership, client engagement, and product shape & direction. Your expertise will shape architecture, frameworks, and product direction, guide internal developers, and provide consultative support to clients.

What We’re Looking For
We’re looking for a can-do, customer-centric leader with a strong development background who thrives in a client-facing environment. You should be comfortable balancing hands-on technical delivery with advising clients, shaping product decisions, and supporting pre-sales and client demos.

Key Responsibilities

Client-Facing Engineering & Product Delivery
Lead the hands-on engineering work for telephony-based SaaS platforms, including building connectors and integrations with Genesys Cloud.
Partner with clients and internal stakeholders to deliver scalable, reliable, and production-ready solutions.
Translate technical decisions into clear, consultative recommendations for clients and internal teams.

Platform, Infrastructure & DevOps
Maintain, optimise, and support AWS and Microsoft cloud environments, including servers, CI/CD pipelines, and production deployment.
Database skills require (primarily postgres) and ETL experience.
Oversee telephony product infrastructure, monitoring, and observability to ensure smooth operation.
Support QA, testing, and disaster recovery processes.

Product & Technical Leadership
Influence the product roadmap and architecture, working closely with Product to ensure the platform meets client and market needs.
Define engineering frameworks, coding standards, and delivery patterns for a small but growing team of developers.
Embed AI and automation capabilities into the product to enhance CX outcomes.

Team Growth & Consulting Excellence
Build, mentor, and scale a high-performing engineering capability within a consulting delivery context.
Lead the delivery of client-focused engineering solutions while maintaining a consultative approach.
Support pre-sales, demos, and client workshops to shape solutions and drive product adoption.

Skills & Experience

Engineering & Development
Strong hands-on development experience with C#, .NET, REST APIs, JSON, asynchronous programming, and secure coding.
Experience with Genesys Cloud, telephony integrations, and connector development.
Comfortable developing production-ready code while guiding client outcomes.

Product & Platform
Experience influencing product roadmaps and architecture in a SaaS environment.
Familiarity with telephony and CX platforms, including integrations, automation, and data flows.

Cloud & Infrastructure
AWS and Azure experience, including environment setup, optimisation, and ongoing maintenance.
Understanding of DevOps practices including CI/CD pipelines, Docker, and monitoring.

Consulting & Stakeholder Engagement
Comfortable working directly with clients, providing guidance and recommendations while delivering tangible results.
Strong communication skills, able to translate technical concepts for business stakeholders.
Ability to work autonomously in a consulting environment, balancing technical delivery with client-facing responsibilities.

Why This Role
Exciting opportunity to work on a fast-scaling SaaS telephony product with autonomy over architecture and product direction.
Hands-on development while also engaging directly with clients in a consulting context.
Be part of a small, expanding team, with opportunities to mentor, build, and scale a team.
Work on transformative CX solutions, embedding AI and automation to reshape customer service in Australia.

If this role sounds like you and you're interested to find out more - please apply now!
requestBody.job_title: Senior Engineering Lead – CX & Telephony Product (Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane)

requestBody.job_details:
About the job
Role Overview
We are seeking a Senior Engineering Lead in a consulting capacity to take ownership of the engineering and technical direction of a fast-growing SaaS telephony and CX product.
This is a hands-on consulting role, combining engineering leadership, client engagement, and product shape & direction. Your expertise will shape architecture, frameworks, and product direction, guide internal developers, and provide consultative support to clients.

What We’re Looking For
We’re looking for a can-do, customer-centric leader with a strong development background who thrives in a client-facing environment. You should be comfortable balancing hands-on technical delivery with advising clients, shaping product decisions, and supporting pre-sales and client demos.

Key Responsibilities

Client-Facing Engineering & Product Delivery
Lead the hands-on engineering work for telephony-based SaaS platforms, including building connectors and integrations with Genesys Cloud.
Partner with clients and internal stakeholders to deliver scalable, reliable, and production-ready solutions.
Translate technical decisions into clear, consultative recommendations for clients and internal teams.

Platform, Infrastructure & DevOps
Maintain, optimise, and support AWS and Microsoft cloud environments, including servers, CI/CD pipelines, and production deployment.
Database skills require (primarily postgres) and ETL experience.
Oversee telephony product infrastructure, monitoring, and observability to ensure smooth operation.
Support QA, testing, and disaster recovery processes.

Product & Technical Leadership
Influence the product roadmap and architecture, working closely with Product to ensure the platform meets client and market needs.
Define engineering frameworks, coding standards, and delivery patterns for a small but growing team of developers.
Embed AI and automation capabilities into the product to enhance CX outcomes.

Team Growth & Consulting Excellence
Build, mentor, and scale a high-performing engineering capability within a consulting delivery context.
Lead the delivery of client-focused engineering solutions while maintaining a consultative approach.
Support pre-sales, demos, and client workshops to shape solutions and drive product adoption.

Skills & Experience

Engineering & Development
Strong hands-on development experience with C#, .NET, REST APIs, JSON, asynchronous programming, and secure coding.
Experience with Genesys Cloud, telephony integrations, and connector development.
Comfortable developing production-ready code while guiding client outcomes.

Product & Platform
Experience influencing product roadmaps and architecture in a SaaS environment.
Familiarity with telephony and CX platforms, including integrations, automation, and data flows.

Cloud & Infrastructure
AWS and Azure experience, including environment setup, optimisation, and ongoing maintenance.
Understanding of DevOps practices including CI/CD pipelines, Docker, and monitoring.

Consulting & Stakeholder Engagement
Comfortable working directly with clients, providing guidance and recommendations while delivering tangible results.
Strong communication skills, able to translate technical concepts for business stakeholders.
Ability to work autonomously in a consulting environment, balancing technical delivery with client-facing responsibilities.

Why This Role
Exciting opportunity to work on a fast-scaling SaaS telephony product with autonomy over architecture and product direction.
Hands-on development while also engaging directly with clients in a consulting context.
Be part of a small, expanding team, with opportunities to mentor, build, and scale a team.
Work on transformative CX solutions, embedding AI and automation to reshape customer service in Australia.

If this role sounds like you and you're interested to find out more - please apply now!

requestBody.job_details:
About the job
About Persistent
We are a trusted Digital Engineering and Enterprise Modernization partner, combining deep technical expertise and industry experience to help our clients anticipate what’s next. Our offerings and proven solutions create a unique competitive advantage for our clients by giving them the power to see beyond and rise above. We work with many industry-leading organizations across the world, including 12 of the 30 most innovative global companies, 60% of the largest banks in the US and India, and numerous innovators across the healthcare ecosystem.
Our disruptor’s mindset, commitment to client success, and agility to thrive in the dynamic environment have enabled us to sustain our growth momentum by reporting $328.2M revenue in Q1 FY25, delivering 16% Y-o-Y growth. Our 23,500+ global team members, located in 19 countries, have been instrumental in helping the market leaders transform their industries. We’re also pleased to share that Persistent has been recognized as a Leader in the ISG Provider Lens™ Digital Engineering Services Quadrant Report for the U.S. and Europe 2024. We were also recognized for excellence in governance and executive leadership in Institutional Investor’s 2024 Asia Executive Team Survey. Throughout our market-leading growth, we’ve maintained a strong employee satisfaction score of 8.2/10.

About Position:
Role: Sr. Java Developer
Location: Sydney, Australia
Job Type: Contract
Experience: 12 -15 years
Skills: Java, Microservices, React, AWS

Roles & Responsibilities:
Lead the Java full stack development: Implement scalable, high-performance full stack solutions using Java, Spring Boot, React, Next.js, ensuring smooth integration using Backend For Frontend APIs and Service Domain modelsEnsure performance and scalability: Focus on optimizing the front-end platform for scalability and performance. Continuously refine and improve the platform’s architecture to support a growing number of users and complex features.
Maintain security best practices: Implement security best practices in the platform ensuring robust protection against vulnerabilities and maintaining compliance with industry standards.
CI/CD with GitHub Actions: Build and maintain GitHub Actions pipelines for continuous integration and deployment, enabling fast and reliable feature delivery with minimal friction.
Perform code reviews: Review code submitted by other engineers, ensuring adherence to best practices, platform standards, and security guidelines. Provide constructive feedback and encourage continuous learning and improvement.
Collaborate on architecture: Lead discussions and decision-making on architecture with a team of passionate engineers. Be receptive to new ideas while maintaining a strong vision for the platform.
Mentor and guide engineers: Provide mentorship and guidance to junior and mid-level engineers, helping them develop their technical skills while maintaining a focus on quality, scalability, and performance.
Drive cross-functional collaboration: Work closely with product managers, designers, and back-end engineers to deliver features and improvements aligned with business objectives.
 Essential Skills:
We use a broad range of tools, languages, and frameworks. We don’t expect you to know them all but experience or exposure with some of these will set you up for success in this team: 
Minimum 12+ years of experience
Experience in Backend tech - Java, Spring Boot 
Expertise with Microservices, Restful API design pattern
Experienced in frontend tech – Next.js 
DevOps and CI/CD – TeamCity, GitHub Copilot
AWS Cloud – EC2, SNS, S3, Lambda, Certification is a must
DevOps and CI/CD – TeamCity, GitHub Actions, Grafana, Prometheus 
AI & Machine learning and LLM knowledge is desired 
Experience in Redux, Kafka, Banking domain is desired 
  Education Qualifications:
Bachelor’s degree in Engineering in Computer Science/Information Technology

Benefits:
Competitive salary and benefits package
Culture focused on talent development with quarterly promotion cycles and company-sponsored higher education and certifications
Opportunity to work with cutting-edge technologies
Employee engagement initiatives such as project parties, flexible work hours, and Long Service awards
Annual health check-ups
Insurance coverage: group term life, personal accident, and Mediclaim hospitalization for self, spouse, two children, and parents.

Our company fosters a values-driven and people-centric work environment that enables our employees to:
Accelerate growth, both professionally and personally
Impact the world in powerful, positive ways, using the latest technologies.
Enjoy collaborative innovation, with diversity and work-life wellbeing at the core.
Unlock global opportunities to work and learn with the industry’s best.

Let’s unleash your full potential at Persistent - persistent.com/careers
“Persistent is an Equal Opportunity Employer and prohibits discrimination and harassment of any kind.”

About Position:
Role: Sr. Java Developer
Location: Sydney, Australia
Job Type: Contract
Experience: 12 -15 years
Skills: Java, Microservices, React, AWS

Roles & Responsibilities:
Lead the Java full stack development: Implement scalable, high-performance full stack solutions using Java, Spring Boot, React, Next.js, ensuring smooth integration using Backend For Frontend APIs and Service Domain modelsEnsure performance and scalability: Focus on optimizing the front-end platform for scalability and performance. Continuously refine and improve the platform’s architecture to support a growing number of users and complex features.
Maintain security best practices: Implement security best practices in the platform ensuring robust protection against vulnerabilities and maintaining compliance with industry standards.
CI/CD with GitHub Actions: Build and maintain GitHub Actions pipelines for continuous integration and deployment, enabling fast and reliable feature delivery with minimal friction.
Perform code reviews: Review code submitted by other engineers, ensuring adherence to best practices, platform standards, and security guidelines. Provide constructive feedback and encourage continuous learning and improvement.
Collaborate on architecture: Lead discussions and decision-making on architecture with a team of passionate engineers. Be receptive to new ideas while maintaining a strong vision for the platform.
Mentor and guide engineers: Provide mentorship and guidance to junior and mid-level engineers, helping them develop their technical skills while maintaining a focus on quality, scalability, and performance.
Drive cross-functional collaboration: Work closely with product managers, designers, and back-end engineers to deliver features and improvements aligned with business objectives.
 Essential Skills:
We use a broad range of tools, languages, and frameworks. We don’t expect you to know them all but experience or exposure with some of these will set you up for success in this team: 
Minimum 12+ years of experience
Experience in Backend tech - Java, Spring Boot 
Expertise with Microservices, Restful API design pattern
Experienced in frontend tech – Next.js 
DevOps and CI/CD – TeamCity, GitHub Copilot
AWS Cloud – EC2, SNS, S3, Lambda, Certification is a must
DevOps and CI/CD – TeamCity, GitHub Actions, Grafana, Prometheus 
AI & Machine learning and LLM knowledge is desired 
Experience in Redux, Kafka, Banking domain is desired 
  Education Qualifications:
Bachelor’s degree in Engineering in Computer Science/Information Technology

Benefits:
Competitive salary and benefits package
Culture focused on talent development with quarterly promotion cycles and company-sponsored higher education and certifications
Opportunity to work with cutting-edge technologies
Employee engagement initiatives such as project parties, flexible work hours, and Long Service awards
Annual health check-ups

About Position:
Role: Sr. Java Developer
Location: Sydney, Australia
Job Type: Contract
Experience: 12 -15 years
Skills: Java, Microservices, React, AWS

Roles & Responsibilities:
Lead the Java full stack development: Implement scalable, high-performance full stack solutions using Java, Spring Boot, React, Next.js, ensuring smooth integration using Backend For Frontend APIs and Service Domain modelsEnsure performance and scalability: Focus on optimizing the front-end platform for scalability and performance. Continuously refine and improve the platform’s architecture to support a growing number of users and complex features.
Maintain security best practices: Implement security best practices in the platform ensuring robust protection against vulnerabilities and maintaining compliance with industry standards.
CI/CD with GitHub Actions: Build and maintain GitHub Actions pipelines for continuous integration and deployment, enabling fast and reliable feature delivery with minimal friction.
Perform code reviews: Review code submitted by other engineers, ensuring adherence to best practices, platform standards, and security guidelines. Provide constructive feedback and encourage continuous learning and improvement.
Collaborate on architecture: Lead discussions and decision-making on architecture with a team of passionate engineers. Be receptive to new ideas while maintaining a strong vision for the platform.
Mentor and guide engineers: Provide mentorship and guidance to junior and mid-level engineers, helping them develop their technical skills while maintaining a focus on quality, scalability, and performance.
Drive cross-functional collaboration: Work closely with product managers, designers, and back-end engineers to deliver features and improvements aligned with business objectives.
 Essential Skills:
We use a broad range of tools, languages, and frameworks. We don’t expect you to know them all but experience or exposure with some of these will set you up for success in this team: 
Minimum 12+ years of experience
Experience in Backend tech - Java, Spring Boot 
Expertise with Microservices, Restful API design pattern
Experienced in frontend tech – Next.js 
DevOps and CI/CD – TeamCity, GitHub Copilot
AWS Cloud – EC2, SNS, S3, Lambda, Certification is a must
DevOps and CI/CD – TeamCity, GitHub Actions, Grafana, Prometheus 
AI & Machine learning and LLM knowledge is desired 
Experience in Redux, Kafka, Banking domain is desired 
  Education Qualifications:
Bachelor’s degree in Engineering in Computer Science/Information Technology

Benefits:
Competitive salary and benefits package
Culture focused on talent development with quarterly promotion cycles and company-sponsored higher education and certifications
Opportunity to work with cutting-edge technologies
Employee engagement initiatives such as project parties, flexible work hours, and Long Service awards
Annual health check-ups

Accelerate growth, both professionally and personally

Our offerings and proven solutions create a unique competitive advantage for our clients by giving them the power to see beyond and rise above. We work with many industry-leading organizations across the world, including 12 of the 30 most innovative global companies, 60% of the largest banks in the US and India, and numerous innovators across the healthcare ecosystem.
Our disruptor’s mindset, commitment to client success, and agility to thrive in the dynamic environment have enabled us to sustain our growth momentum by reporting $328.2M revenue in Q1 FY25, delivering 16% Y-o-Y growth. Our 23,500+ global team members, located in 19 countries, have been instrumental in helping the market leaders transform their industries. We’re also pleased to share that Persistent has been recognized as a Leader in the ISG Provider Lens™ Digital Engineering Services Quadrant Report for the U.S. and Europe 2024. We were also recognized for excellence in governance and executive leadership in Institutional Investor’s 2024 Asia Executive Team Survey. Throughout our market-leading growth, we’ve maintained a strong employee satisfaction score of 8.2/10.

About Position:
Role: Sr. Java Developer
Location: Sydney, Australia
Job Type: Contract
Experience: 12 -15 years
Skills: Java, Microservices, React, AWS

Roles & Responsibilities:
Lead the Java full stack development: Implement scalable, high-performance full stack solutions using Java, Spring Boot, React, Next.js, ensuring smooth integration using Backend For Frontend APIs and Service Domain modelsEnsure performance and scalability: Focus on optimizing the front-end platform for scalability and performance. Continuously refine and improve the platform’s architecture to support a growing number of users and complex features.
Maintain security best practices: Implement security best practices in the platform ensuring robust protection against vulnerabilities and maintaining compliance with industry standards.
CI/CD with GitHub Actions: Build and maintain GitHub Actions pipelines for continuous integration and deployment, enabling fast and reliable feature delivery with minimal friction.
Perform code reviews: Review code submitted by other engineers, ensuring adherence to best practices, platform standards, and security guidelines. Provide constructive feedback and encourage continuous learning and improvement.
Collaborate on architecture: Lead discussions and decision-making on architecture with a team of passionate engineers. Be receptive to new ideas while maintaining a strong vision for the platform.
Mentor and guide engineers: Provide mentorship and guidance to junior and mid-level engineers, helping them develop their technical skills while maintaining a focus on quality, scalability, and performance.
Drive cross-functional collaboration: Work closely with product managers, designers, and back-end engineers to deliver features and improvements aligned with business objectives.
 Essential Skills:
We use a broad range of tools, languages, and frameworks. We don’t expect you to know them all but experience or exposure with some of these will set you up for success in this team: 
Minimum 12+ years of experience
Experience in Backend tech - Java, Spring Boot 
Expertise with Microservices, Restful API design pattern
Experienced in frontend tech – Next.js 
DevOps and CI/CD – TeamCity, GitHub Copilot
AWS Cloud – EC2, SNS, S3, Lambda, Certification is a must
DevOps and CI/CD – TeamCity, GitHub Actions, Grafana, Prometheus 
AI & Machine learning and LLM knowledge is desired 
Experience in Redux, Kafka, Banking domain is desired 
  Education Qualifications:
Bachelor’s degree in Engineering in Computer Science/Information Technology

Benefits:
Competitive salary and benefits package
Culture focused on talent development with quarterly promotion cycles and company-sponsored higher education and certifications
Opportunity to work with cutting-edge technologies
Employee engagement initiatives such as project parties, flexible work hours, and Long Service awards
Annual health check-ups
Insurance coverage: group term life, personal accident, and Mediclaim hospitalization for self, spouse, two children, and parents.

Our company fosters a values-driven and people-centric work environment that enables our employees to:
Accelerate growth, both professionally and personally
Impact the world in powerful, positive ways, using the latest technologies.
Enjoy collaborative innovation, with diversity and work-life wellbeing at the core.
Unlock global opportunities to work and learn with the industry’s best.

Let’s unleash your full potential at Persistent - persistent.com/careers
“Persistent is an Equal Opportunity Employer and prohibits discrimination and harassment of any kind.”
requestBody.prompt:
For each of these employer questions, analyze the question and my resume/background, then return ONLY a JSON array with the recommended responses.

Response Format:
- For "select" questions: single number (e.g., 2)
- For "checkbox" questions: array of numbers (e.g., [0,3,7])
- For "text" questions: concise string answer

Example: If Q1 is select (recommend option 3), Q2 is checkbox (recommend options 1,4), Q3 is text:
Return: [3, [1,4], "Your concise answer"]

Rules:
- Return ONLY the array, no explanations or text
- Use 0-based indexing (first option = 0, second = 1, etc.)
- Array length must match number of questions
- Select questions = single number, checkbox questions = array of numbers, text questions = string
- Consider my actual experience and background from resume
- Choose answers that are truthful and aligned with the job

Questions: [Questions List]

requestBody.resume_text:
JOHN DOE
Software Engineer
Email: john.doe@email.com | Phone: (555) 123-4567
LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/johndoe | GitHub: github.com/johndoe

SUMMARY
Experienced Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience developing scalable web applications and distributed systems. Proficient in Python, JavaScript, and cloud technologies. Strong background in REST APIs, Docker, and CI/CD pipelines.

EXPERIENCE

Senior Software Engineer | TechCorp Inc. | San Francisco, CA | 2021 - Present
• Developed and maintained microservices architecture serving 1M+ daily users
• Implemented CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and Docker, reducing deployment time by 60%
• Led a team of 3 junior developers and mentored new hires
• Technologies: Python, Flask, PostgreSQL, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes

Software Engineer | StartupXYZ | Austin, TX | 2019 - 2021
• Built REST APIs for mobile and web applications using Python and Django
• Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver features on tight deadlines
• Optimized database queries improving application performance by 40%
• Technologies: Python, Django, MySQL, Redis, Git

Junior Developer | DevShop LLC | Austin, TX | 2018 - 2019
• Developed frontend components using React and JavaScript
• Participated in code reviews and followed agile development practices
• Fixed bugs and implemented small features under senior guidance
• Technologies: JavaScript, React, Node.js, MongoDB

EDUCATION
Bachelor of Science in Computer Science | University of Texas at Austin | 2018
GPA: 3.8/4.0
Relevant Coursework: Data Structures, Algorithms, Database Systems, Software Engineering

SKILLS
Programming Languages: Python, JavaScript, Java, Go
Frameworks: Django, Flask, React, Node.js
Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis
Cloud & DevOps: AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, Git
Other: REST APIs, Microservices, Agile Development, Testing

CERTIFICATIONS
• AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Associate (2022)
• Docker Certified Associate (2021)

PROJECTS
E-commerce Platform | Personal Project | 2020
• Built a full-stack e-commerce application using Python/Django and React
• Implemented payment processing with Stripe API
• Deployed on AWS using Docker containers
• GitHub: github.com/johndoe/ecommerce-platform

About Position:
Role: Sr. Java Developer
Location: Sydney, Australia
Job Type: Contract
Experience: 12 -15 years
Skills: Java, Microservices, React, AWS

Roles & Responsibilities:
Lead the Java full stack development: Implement scalable, high-performance full stack solutions using Java, Spring Boot, React, Next.js, ensuring smooth integration using Backend For Frontend APIs and Service Domain modelsEnsure performance and scalability: Focus on optimizing the front-end platform for scalability and performance. Continuously refine and improve the platform’s architecture to support a growing number of users and complex features.
Maintain security best practices: Implement security best practices in the platform ensuring robust protection against vulnerabilities and maintaining compliance with industry standards.
CI/CD with GitHub Actions: Build and maintain GitHub Actions pipelines for continuous integration and deployment, enabling fast and reliable feature delivery with minimal friction.
Perform code reviews: Review code submitted by other engineers, ensuring adherence to best practices, platform standards, and security guidelines. Provide constructive feedback and encourage continuous learning and improvement.
Collaborate on architecture: Lead discussions and decision-making on architecture with a team of passionate engineers. Be receptive to new ideas while maintaining a strong vision for the platform.
Mentor and guide engineers: Provide mentorship and guidance to junior and mid-level engineers, helping them develop their technical skills while maintaining a focus on quality, scalability, and performance.
Drive cross-functional collaboration: Work closely with product managers, designers, and back-end engineers to deliver features and improvements aligned with business objectives.
 Essential Skills:
We use a broad range of tools, languages, and frameworks. We don’t expect you to know them all but experience or exposure with some of these will set you up for success in this team: 
Minimum 12+ years of experience
Experience in Backend tech - Java, Spring Boot 
Expertise with Microservices, Restful API design pattern
Experienced in frontend tech – Next.js 
DevOps and CI/CD – TeamCity, GitHub Copilot
AWS Cloud – EC2, SNS, S3, Lambda, Certification is a must
DevOps and CI/CD – TeamCity, GitHub Actions, Grafana, Prometheus 
AI & Machine learning and LLM knowledge is desired 
Experience in Redux, Kafka, Banking domain is desired 
  Education Qualifications:
Bachelor’s degree in Engineering in Computer Science/Information Technology

Benefits:
Competitive salary and benefits package
Culture focused on talent development with quarterly promotion cycles and company-sponsored higher education and certifications
Opportunity to work with cutting-edge technologies
Employee engagement initiatives such as project parties, flexible work hours, and Long Service awards
Annual health check-ups
Insurance coverage: group term life, personal accident, and Mediclaim hospitalization for self, spouse, two children, and parents.

Accelerate growth, both professionally and personally

requestBody.prompt:
For each of these employer questions, analyze the question and my resume/background, then return ONLY a JSON array with the recommended responses.

Response Format:
- For "select" questions: single number (e.g., 2)
- For "checkbox" questions: array of numbers (e.g., [0,3,7])
- For "text" questions: concise string answer

Example: If Q1 is select (recommend option 3), Q2 is checkbox (recommend options 1,4), Q3 is text:
Return: [3, [1,4], "Your concise answer"]

Rules:
- Return ONLY the array, no explanations or text
- Use 0-based indexing (first option = 0, second = 1, etc.)
- Array length must match number of questions
- Select questions = single number, checkbox questions = array of numbers, text questions = string
- Consider my actual experience and background from resume
- Choose answers that are truthful and aligned with the job

Questions: [Questions List]

JOHN DOE
Software Engineer
Email: john.doe@email.com | Phone: (555) 123-4567
LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/johndoe | GitHub: github.com/johndoe

SUMMARY
Experienced Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience developing scalable web applications and distributed systems. Proficient in Python, JavaScript, and cloud technologies. Strong background in REST APIs, Docker, and CI/CD pipelines.

EXPERIENCE

Senior Software Engineer | TechCorp Inc. | San Francisco, CA | 2021 - Present
• Developed and maintained microservices architecture serving 1M+ daily users
• Implemented CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and Docker, reducing deployment time by 60%
• Led a team of 3 junior developers and mentored new hires
• Technologies: Python, Flask, PostgreSQL, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes

Software Engineer | StartupXYZ | Austin, TX | 2019 - 2021
• Built REST APIs for mobile and web applications using Python and Django
• Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver features on tight deadlines
• Optimized database queries improving application performance by 40%
• Technologies: Python, Django, MySQL, Redis, Git

Junior Developer | DevShop LLC | Austin, TX | 2018 - 2019
• Developed frontend components using React and JavaScript
• Participated in code reviews and followed agile development practices
• Fixed bugs and implemented small features under senior guidance
• Technologies: JavaScript, React, Node.js, MongoDB

EDUCATION
Bachelor of Science in Computer Science | University of Texas at Austin | 2018
GPA: 3.8/4.0
Relevant Coursework: Data Structures, Algorithms, Database Systems, Software Engineering

SKILLS
Programming Languages: Python, JavaScript, Java, Go
Frameworks: Django, Flask, React, Node.js
Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis
Cloud & DevOps: AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, Git
Other: REST APIs, Microservices, Agile Development, Testing

CERTIFICATIONS
• AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Associate (2022)
• Docker Certified Associate (2021)

PROJECTS

• Built a full-stack e-commerce application using Python/Django and React
• Implemented payment processing with Stripe API
• Deployed on AWS using Docker containers
• GitHub: github.com/johndoe/ecommerce-platform

About Position:
Role: Sr. Java Developer
Location: Sydney, Australia
Job Type: Contract
Experience: 12 -15 years
Skills: Java, Microservices, React, AWS

Roles & Responsibilities:
Lead the Java full stack development: Implement scalable, high-performance full stack solutions using Java, Spring Boot, React, Next.js, ensuring smooth integration using Backend For Frontend APIs and Service Domain modelsEnsure performance and scalability: Focus on optimizing the front-end platform for scalability and performance. Continuously refine and improve the platform’s architecture to support a growing number of users and complex features.
Maintain security best practices: Implement security best practices in the platform ensuring robust protection against vulnerabilities and maintaining compliance with industry standards.
CI/CD with GitHub Actions: Build and maintain GitHub Actions pipelines for continuous integration and deployment, enabling fast and reliable feature delivery with minimal friction.
Perform code reviews: Review code submitted by other engineers, ensuring adherence to best practices, platform standards, and security guidelines. Provide constructive feedback and encourage continuous learning and improvement.
Collaborate on architecture: Lead discussions and decision-making on architecture with a team of passionate engineers. Be receptive to new ideas while maintaining a strong vision for the platform.
Mentor and guide engineers: Provide mentorship and guidance to junior and mid-level engineers, helping them develop their technical skills while maintaining a focus on quality, scalability, and performance.
Drive cross-functional collaboration: Work closely with product managers, designers, and back-end engineers to deliver features and improvements aligned with business objectives.
 Essential Skills:
We use a broad range of tools, languages, and frameworks. We don’t expect you to know them all but experience or exposure with some of these will set you up for success in this team: 
Minimum 12+ years of experience
Experience in Backend tech - Java, Spring Boot 
Expertise with Microservices, Restful API design pattern
Experienced in frontend tech – Next.js 
DevOps and CI/CD – TeamCity, GitHub Copilot
AWS Cloud – EC2, SNS, S3, Lambda, Certification is a must
DevOps and CI/CD – TeamCity, GitHub Actions, Grafana, Prometheus 
AI & Machine learning and LLM knowledge is desired 
Experience in Redux, Kafka, Banking domain is desired 
  Education Qualifications:
Bachelor’s degree in Engineering in Computer Science/Information Technology

Benefits:
Competitive salary and benefits package
Culture focused on talent development with quarterly promotion cycles and company-sponsored higher education and certifications
Opportunity to work with cutting-edge technologies
Employee engagement initiatives such as project parties, flexible work hours, and Long Service awards
Annual health check-ups
Insurance coverage: group term life, personal accident, and Mediclaim hospitalization for self, spouse, two children, and parents.

Accelerate growth, both professionally and personally

requestBody.prompt:
For each of these employer questions, analyze the question and my resume/background, then return ONLY a JSON array with the recommended responses.

Response Format:
- For "select" questions: single number (e.g., 2)
- For "checkbox" questions: array of numbers (e.g., [0,3,7])
- For "text" questions: concise string answer

Example: If Q1 is select (recommend option 3), Q2 is checkbox (recommend options 1,4), Q3 is text:
Return: [3, [1,4], "Your concise answer"]

Rules:
- Return ONLY the array, no explanations or text
- Use 0-based indexing (first option = 0, second = 1, etc.)
- Array length must match number of questions
- Select questions = single number, checkbox questions = array of numbers, text questions = string
- Consider my actual experience and background from resume
- Choose answers that are truthful and aligned with the job

Questions: [Questions List]

JOHN DOE
Software Engineer
Email: john.doe@email.com | Phone: (555) 123-4567
LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/johndoe | GitHub: github.com/johndoe

SUMMARY
Experienced Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience developing scalable web applications and distributed systems. Proficient in Python, JavaScript, and cloud technologies. Strong background in REST APIs, Docker, and CI/CD pipelines.

EXPERIENCE

Senior Software Engineer | TechCorp Inc. | San Francisco, CA | 2021 - Present
• Developed and maintained microservices architecture serving 1M+ daily users
• Implemented CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and Docker, reducing deployment time by 60%
• Led a team of 3 junior developers and mentored new hires
• Technologies: Python, Flask, PostgreSQL, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes

Software Engineer | StartupXYZ | Austin, TX | 2019 - 2021
• Built REST APIs for mobile and web applications using Python and Django
• Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver features on tight deadlines
• Optimized database queries improving application performance by 40%
• Technologies: Python, Django, MySQL, Redis, Git

Junior Developer | DevShop LLC | Austin, TX | 2018 - 2019
• Developed frontend components using React and JavaScript
• Participated in code reviews and followed agile development practices
• Fixed bugs and implemented small features under senior guidance
• Technologies: JavaScript, React, Node.js, MongoDB

EDUCATION
Bachelor of Science in Computer Science | University of Texas at Austin | 2018
GPA: 3.8/4.0
Relevant Coursework: Data Structures, Algorithms, Database Systems, Software Engineering

SKILLS
Programming Languages: Python, JavaScript, Java, Go
Frameworks: Django, Flask, React, Node.js
Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis
Cloud & DevOps: AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, Git
Other: REST APIs, Microservices, Agile Development, Testing

CERTIFICATIONS
• AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Associate (2022)
• Docker Certified Associate (2021)

PROJECTS

• Built a full-stack e-commerce application using Python/Django and React
• Implemented payment processing with Stripe API
• Deployed on AWS using Docker containers
• GitHub: github.com/johndoe/ecommerce-platform

requestBody.job_details:
About the job
🚀 SEO & Digital Marketing Specialist – Two Growing Entities (Silverwater, NSW)

We are recruiting a SEO & Digital Marketing Specialist to join our head office at 56 Silverwater Road, Silverwater NSW 2128, working across two affiliated business entities in the equipment sector.

Both businesses manufacture and distribute high-quality equipment into the fitness, stone, glass, tiling, timber, steel and construction industries, and we’re looking for someone who can help us lift our online visibility, drive qualified traffic and generate B2B leads.

About the role

- You’ll be responsible for planning and executing SEO and digital initiatives across both brands, including:
- SEO strategy & implementation (on-page, off-page and basic technical SEO)
- Keyword research, content briefs and optimisation of existing pages
- On-page optimisation: titles, meta descriptions, headings, internal linking, image optimisation, schema where relevant
- Working with landing pages, product pages and blogs to improve rankings and conversions
- Monitoring performance via Google Analytics, Search Console and other tools
- Producing regular SEO and traffic reports with clear recommendations
- Supporting broader digital activity (e.g. email campaigns, basic paid search or social if needed)
- Collaborating with the sales and marketing team to align SEO with campaigns and commercial priorities

About you

- Solid experience in SEO and digital marketing (agency or in-house)
- Strong understanding of on-page, off-page and technical SEO fundamentals
- Comfortable using tools like Google Analytics, Search Console, keyword tools (e.g. SEMrush, Ahrefs or similar)
- Able to write or brief clear, SEO-friendly content for B2B audiences
- Data-driven, able to turn numbers into actions and priorities
- Organised, proactive and confident managing multiple tasks across two brands
- Experience in B2B, industrial, equipment or trade industries is a bonus, but not essential

What we offer
- The chance to build and shape SEO across two brands from the inside
- Direct access to senior decision-makers – your work will be seen and used
- Variety across fitness and industrial/material-handling markets
- Full-time, on-site role in a supportive, close-knit team in Silverwater

📩 How to apply
Please send your CV and any portfolio / examples of SEO work (before/after, case studies, reports) to:
clive@abaco.com.au

Feel free to share this post or tag someone who could be a great fit.

#Hiring #SEO #SEOSpecialist #DigitalMarketing #SydneyCareers #Silverwater #B2BMarketing #FitnessIndustry #ConstructionIndustry #EquipmentIndustry

About the job
🚀 SEO & Digital Marketing Specialist – Two Growing Entities (Silverwater, NSW)

We are recruiting a SEO & Digital Marketing Specialist to join our head office at 56 Silverwater Road, Silverwater NSW 2128, working across two affiliated business entities in the equipment sector.

Both businesses manufacture and distribute high-quality equipment into the fitness, stone, glass, tiling, timber, steel and construction industries, and we’re looking for someone who can help us lift our online visibility, drive qualified traffic and generate B2B leads.

About the role

- You’ll be responsible for planning and executing SEO and digital initiatives across both brands, including:
- SEO strategy & implementation (on-page, off-page and basic technical SEO)
- Keyword research, content briefs and optimisation of existing pages
- On-page optimisation: titles, meta descriptions, headings, internal linking, image optimisation, schema where relevant
- Working with landing pages, product pages and blogs to improve rankings and conversions
- Monitoring performance via Google Analytics, Search Console and other tools
- Producing regular SEO and traffic reports with clear recommendations
- Supporting broader digital activity (e.g. email campaigns, basic paid search or social if needed)
- Collaborating with the sales and marketing team to align SEO with campaigns and commercial priorities

About you

- Solid experience in SEO and digital marketing (agency or in-house)
- Strong understanding of on-page, off-page and technical SEO fundamentals
- Comfortable using tools like Google Analytics, Search Console, keyword tools (e.g. SEMrush, Ahrefs or similar)
- Able to write or brief clear, SEO-friendly content for B2B audiences
- Data-driven, able to turn numbers into actions and priorities
- Organised, proactive and confident managing multiple tasks across two brands
- Experience in B2B, industrial, equipment or trade industries is a bonus, but not essential

What we offer
- The chance to build and shape SEO across two brands from the inside
- Direct access to senior decision-makers – your work will be seen and used
- Variety across fitness and industrial/material-handling markets
- Full-time, on-site role in a supportive, close-knit team in Silverwater

📩 How to apply
Please send your CV and any portfolio / examples of SEO work (before/after, case studies, reports) to:
clive@abaco.com.au

Feel free to share this post or tag someone who could be a great fit.

#Hiring #SEO #SEOSpecialist #DigitalMarketing #SydneyCareers #Silverwater #B2BMarketing #FitnessIndustry #ConstructionIndustry #EquipmentIndustry

requestBody.job_details:
About the job
🚀 SEO & Digital Marketing Specialist – Two Growing Entities (Silverwater, NSW)

We are recruiting a SEO & Digital Marketing Specialist to join our head office at 56 Silverwater Road, Silverwater NSW 2128, working across two affiliated business entities in the equipment sector.

Both businesses manufacture and distribute high-quality equipment into the fitness, stone, glass, tiling, timber, steel and construction industries, and we’re looking for someone who can help us lift our online visibility, drive qualified traffic and generate B2B leads.

About the role

- You’ll be responsible for planning and executing SEO and digital initiatives across both brands, including:
- SEO strategy & implementation (on-page, off-page and basic technical SEO)
- Keyword research, content briefs and optimisation of existing pages
- On-page optimisation: titles, meta descriptions, headings, internal linking, image optimisation, schema where relevant
- Working with landing pages, product pages and blogs to improve rankings and conversions
- Monitoring performance via Google Analytics, Search Console and other tools
- Producing regular SEO and traffic reports with clear recommendations
- Supporting broader digital activity (e.g. email campaigns, basic paid search or social if needed)
- Collaborating with the sales and marketing team to align SEO with campaigns and commercial priorities

About you

- Solid experience in SEO and digital marketing (agency or in-house)
- Strong understanding of on-page, off-page and technical SEO fundamentals
- Comfortable using tools like Google Analytics, Search Console, keyword tools (e.g. SEMrush, Ahrefs or similar)
- Able to write or brief clear, SEO-friendly content for B2B audiences
- Data-driven, able to turn numbers into actions and priorities
- Organised, proactive and confident managing multiple tasks across two brands
- Experience in B2B, industrial, equipment or trade industries is a bonus, but not essential

What we offer
- The chance to build and shape SEO across two brands from the inside
- Direct access to senior decision-makers – your work will be seen and used
- Variety across fitness and industrial/material-handling markets
- Full-time, on-site role in a supportive, close-knit team in Silverwater

📩 How to apply
Please send your CV and any portfolio / examples of SEO work (before/after, case studies, reports) to:
clive@abaco.com.au

requestBody.job_details:
About the job
🚀 SEO & Digital Marketing Specialist – Two Growing Entities (Silverwater, NSW)

We are recruiting a SEO & Digital Marketing Specialist to join our head office at 56 Silverwater Road, Silverwater NSW 2128, working across two affiliated business entities in the equipment sector.

Both businesses manufacture and distribute high-quality equipment into the fitness, stone, glass, tiling, timber, steel and construction industries, and we’re looking for someone who can help us lift our online visibility, drive qualified traffic and generate B2B leads.

About the role

- You’ll be responsible for planning and executing SEO and digital initiatives across both brands, including:
- SEO strategy & implementation (on-page, off-page and basic technical SEO)
- Keyword research, content briefs and optimisation of existing pages
- On-page optimisation: titles, meta descriptions, headings, internal linking, image optimisation, schema where relevant
- Working with landing pages, product pages and blogs to improve rankings and conversions
- Monitoring performance via Google Analytics, Search Console and other tools
- Producing regular SEO and traffic reports with clear recommendations
- Supporting broader digital activity (e.g. email campaigns, basic paid search or social if needed)
- Collaborating with the sales and marketing team to align SEO with campaigns and commercial priorities

About you

- Solid experience in SEO and digital marketing (agency or in-house)
- Strong understanding of on-page, off-page and technical SEO fundamentals
- Comfortable using tools like Google Analytics, Search Console, keyword tools (e.g. SEMrush, Ahrefs or similar)
- Able to write or brief clear, SEO-friendly content for B2B audiences
- Data-driven, able to turn numbers into actions and priorities
- Organised, proactive and confident managing multiple tasks across two brands
- Experience in B2B, industrial, equipment or trade industries is a bonus, but not essential

What we offer
- The chance to build and shape SEO across two brands from the inside
- Direct access to senior decision-makers – your work will be seen and used
- Variety across fitness and industrial/material-handling markets
- Full-time, on-site role in a supportive, close-knit team in Silverwater

📩 How to apply
Please send your CV and any portfolio / examples of SEO work (before/after, case studies, reports) to:
clive@abaco.com.au

Feel free to share this post or tag someone who could be a great fit.

#Hiring #SEO #SEOSpecialist #DigitalMarketing #SydneyCareers #Silverwater #B2BMarketing #FitnessIndustry #ConstructionIndustry #EquipmentIndustry

Response Format:
- For "select" questions: single number (e.g., 2)
- For "checkbox" questions: array of numbers (e.g., [0,3,7])

- Use 0-based indexing (first option = 0, second = 1, etc.)
- Array length must match number of questions

- Consider my actual experience and background from resume
- Choose answers that are truthful and aligned with the job

Software Engineer
